title: Agent Skills Standard and SKILL.md Anatomy · Skill Brief: Frontmatter
summary: Create a minimal standards-conforming skill for a repeated review workflow. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext frontmatter increment in a valid focused agent skill. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Write valid name and description metadata within specification constraints.
Create the required SKILL.md and optional scripts, references, and assets with valid names.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Build Frontmatter evidence
steps.instruction: Append a agent-ext-frontmatter-lmlbdu: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Frontmatter into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
agent-ext-frontmatter-lmlbdu:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.
